title: General settings
description: General details of your clinic: identity, branding, scheduling, reminders and billing.
description_for: General details for {{name}}: identity, branding, scheduling, reminders and billing.

identidad.title: Tax identity
identidad.description: Tax ID, legal name and address that will appear on electronic receipts issued by the clinic.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.description: How clients can reach you. Used on emails, reminders and templates.

branding.title: Visual identity
branding.description: Logo and colors shown on the sidebar, receipts and automated emails.

operacion.title: Schedule & appointments
operacion.description: Default scheduling parameters: standard duration, intervals and cancellation rules.

recordatorios.title: Automated reminders
recordatorios.description: Scheduled notifications that VetSaaS sends to your clients via email and WhatsApp.

recordatorios_citas.title: Appointments
recordatorios_citas.description: Confirmations and advance reminders related to the medical schedule.

recordatorios_vacunas.title: Vaccines
recordatorios_vacunas.description: Alerts based on the next suggested date recorded for the vaccination.

grooming_notificaciones.title: Grooming WhatsApp
grooming_notificaciones.description: Choose which service events automatically notify the owner. All options are enabled by default.

hotel_notificaciones.title: Hotel WhatsApp
hotel_notificaciones.description: Configure alerts for every stay stage and each daily log update.

facturacion.title: Billing & SUNAT receipts
facturacion.description: Currency, VAT and whether your clinic will issue electronic receipts (per your plan). Nubefact connection is optional until you enable issuance.

remitente.title: Sender details
remitente.description: How your clients will see the emails and WhatsApp messages that VetSaaS sends on your behalf. The platform handles delivery; you only customize the sender info.

platform_note.title: WhatsApp and email: included in your plan
platform_note.body: The platform sends messages and transactional emails using its own credentials. You don't need to configure anything technical: just choose the name and contact details your clients will see.

fields.nombre_comercial_hint: How your clinic is known to the public. If left empty, the legal name is used.
fields.logo_hint: Upload a square image (PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG) up to 2 MB. Transparent background preferred.
fields.logo_hint_uploaded: Logo stored. Replace it by uploading another image or remove it with the button.
fields.logo_drop: Drag your logo here or click to choose a file
fields.logo_drop_supported: PNG · JPG · WEBP · SVG · 2 MB max
fields.logo_sidebar_updated: Logo updated. The sidebar now shows your new logo.
fields.duracion_cita_default_min_hint: Used when the reason does not define a different duration.
fields.agenda_hora_inicio_hint: Defines when appointment slots begin in the calendar.
fields.agenda_hora_fin_hint: Defines the final appointment hour shown in the calendar. This hour is included.
fields.dias_anticipacion_cita_hint: Clients won't be able to book beyond this horizon.
fields.horas_min_cancelacion_hint: After this window, cancellations are logged as late.
fields.notificar_cita_whatsapp_activo: Send WhatsApp when an appointment is created or changed
fields.notificar_cita_whatsapp_activo_hint: Automatically sends the owner a confirmation for a new appointment or its new date and time after rescheduling.
fields.notificar_grooming_creado_whatsapp_activ: When the grooming appointment is created or rescheduled
Confirms the grooming service, date and time with the owner.
fields.notificar_grooming_en_proceso_whatsapp_a: Lets the owner know their pet is now being groomed.
fields.notificar_grooming_completado_whatsapp_a: Notifies the owner that the service is complete and their pet is ready.
fields.notificar_grooming_cancelado_whatsapp_ac: Notifies the owner that the grooming appointment was cancelled.
fields.notificar_grooming_no_asistio_whatsapp_a: Reports the missed appointment and offers rescheduling.
fields.notificar_hotel_creado_whatsapp_activo: When a stay is created or rescheduled
fields.notificar_hotel_creado_whatsapp_activo_h: Confirms the expected check-in and check-out dates with the owner.
fields.notificar_hotel_confirmado_whatsapp_acti: Notifies the owner that the hotel booking is confirmed.
fields.notificar_hotel_en_estancia_whatsapp_act: Lets the owner know their pet is now at the hotel.
fields.notificar_hotel_completado_whatsapp_acti: Notifies the owner that the stay ended successfully.
fields.notificar_hotel_cancelado_whatsapp_activ: Notifies the owner that the booking was cancelled.
fields.notificar_hotel_no_presento_whatsapp_act: Reports that the missed stay was recorded.
fields.notificar_hotel_bitacora_whatsapp_activo: When a daily log is recorded
Sends the date and notes from the new update to the owner.
fields.recordatorio_48h_activo_hint: Reminds the client two days before their appointment.
fields.recordatorio_2h_activo_hint: Last-minute alert to both client and vet.
fields.recordatorio_cita_momentos: When should the appointment reminder be sent?
fields.recordatorio_vacuna_activo_hint: Notifies when a vaccine is approaching its booster date.
fields.recordatorio_vacuna_dias_antes_hint: You can select multiple times. A WhatsApp message is sent for each checked option.
fields.recordatorio_cumple_activo_hint: Automatic message on each pet's birthday.
fields.precio_incluye_igv_hint: If active, the system derives the taxable base from the final price. Otherwise, VAT is added on top.
fields.ticket_ancho_mm_hint: 56 and 58 mm are narrow rolls (portable printers). 80 mm for wide rolls. You can also pick the width when printing each ticket.
fields.emite_comprobantes_sunat_hint: Turn off if you only use the app for records, scheduling and stock without billing customers. You can still set currency and VAT for quotes or internal tickets.
fields.nubefact_ruc_hint: RUC of the taxpayer registered with Nubefact.
fields.nubefact_api_ruta_hint: Copy the «RUTA» column from Nubefact › Settings › API (Integration). Full URL for your branch (e.g. https://api.nubefact.com/api/v1/…).
fields.nubefact_token_hint: Copy the «TOKEN» column from the same screen. It is not the URL — paste it here separately.
fields.nubefact_token_hint_stored: A token is already stored (encrypted). Enter a new one only to replace it.
fields.whatsapp_display_number_hint: Number that will appear on WhatsApp messages as your clinic's contact. It is not used to send; the platform handles delivery.
fields.email_from_hint: When clients reply to an automated email, the response will be sent here.
fields.email_from_nombre_hint: Appears as the email sender (e.g. "San Patricio Vet Clinic").

nubefact.description: Issues electronic receipts and invoices (SUNAT via Nubefact).

footer.never_updated: No configuration has been saved yet.

plan_sin_facturacion_electronica.title: Your plan does not include SUNAT electronic invoicing
plan_sin_facturacion_electronica.body: You can keep using the system as usual. To issue receipts, the platform admin must assign a plan with the “Electronic invoice” feature enabled.
